titles.text: That Time I Became Friends with The Royal Scuttlebug Family and Fell From Space

descriptions.text: Mario has made some new spectacular friends, who are these fellas? Well, they're the Royal Scuttlebug family. They are on a trip to the famous Hazy Maze Isles to see the new wonder: a Rocket! Ready for its first flight to new adventures! Our plumber and his new friends will make it there safely, right?
